name.full: OPC UA Expert — OPC UA Knowledge Base Agent

description.short: Conversational expert on the OPC UA specification and NodeSets.
description.full: OPC UA Expert is a custom engine agent that answers natural-language questions about the OPC UA specification, information models, and NodeSets. Backed by a continuously refreshed knowledge base of crawled OPC Foundation specs and parsed NodeSet XML, it explains concepts (Pub/Sub, Sessions, Subscriptions), walks ObjectType hierarchies, summarizes companion specifications, and cites sources from opcfoundation.org. Use it in personal chats, group chats, or channels for grounded answers without leaving Microsoft Teams.

commands.title: /help
commands.description: Show available commands and example questions

commands.title: What is OPC UA?
commands.description: Get a high-level overview of the OPC UA standard

commands.title: Explain Pub/Sub
commands.description: Learn how OPC UA Publish/Subscribe messaging works

commands.title: Show the type hierarchy for BaseObjectType
commands.description: Explore an ObjectType and its supertype/subtype chain

commands.title: Summarize the DI companion spec
commands.description: Get a summary of a companion specification NodeSet
